backend/main.mo: Main backend canister defining gym data models, access control, storage mixins, and state maps for members, packages, attendance, videos, and pause requests.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing features, related files, components, and test IDs for deployment promotion and production smoke testing.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Collection of prewritten summaries describing major frontend files and their roles in the gym app UI and logic.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/theme configuration defining OKLCH color tokens and light/dark theme variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the main React application with the RawFit Gym title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app controller handling authentication, health checks, role-based routing, production version notice, and optional smoke-test overlay.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: UI screen shown when a user lacks permissions, offering logout and clearing cached queries.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin interface for viewing member attendance, manually recording check-ins/outs, and generating gym QR codes.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard showing summary stats, notifications, and quick-start info for gym management.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog for creating or editing diet charts, including meal management and form submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Lists diet charts with search and provides create/edit functionality via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Generates, displays, refreshes, and allows downloading of a time-based gym attendance QR code.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: Dialog form for creating or editing a gym member, including package selection, pricing, dates, and discount parsing logic.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Displays searchable member list with status badges and opens the member form dialog for creating or editing profiles.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: Dialog form for creating or editing membership packages with fields for type, duration, and pricing.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Shows searchable list of membership packages with options to create, edit, or delete packages using dialogs.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Displays pending pause requests and provides dialogs for admins to approve or deny them with optional messages.
UI for viewing, approving, and denying pause requests, including dialogs and status handling.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestDataDi: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Displays searchable video library with upload trigger and video preview cards.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog for uploading a new workout video with metadata, file handling, and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog to create or edit workout charts, supporting exercises management and form submission.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Lists workout charts with search and supports creating or editing via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Reusable error boundary component that catches render errors and displays a recovery UI with retry capability.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header bar showing the RawFit Gym logo, branding, and a user profile dropdown with logout support.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Dashboard component fetching member data, attendance, plans, and managing pause/resume membership actions with multiple UI sections.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Header showing gym branding and a member avatar menu with profile info and logout.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card displaying membership status and any pause request details with conditional alerts.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Video library gated by geolocation, fetching videos and enforcing proximity to the gym.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: QR attendance component handling location checks, QR scanning, validation, and check-in recording.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Displays a version mismatch alert based on computed status, hiding itself when versions match.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for collecting and submitting user name and email to create a profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating and managing backend actor instances based on identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication using Dfinity AuthClient, handling login state and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Manages member authentication via localStorage, syncing changes across tabs and providing login/logout helpers with backend validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend interactions including health checks, user profiles, roles, and member management operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light and dark themes with custom color tokens.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as INR, computing per‑month pricing, and coercing various inputs into INR format.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Provides geolocation utilities including distance calculation, location retrieval, and gym proximity verification.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Implements QR code generation, parsing, timestamp validation, and checksum-based verification for gym attendance.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Renders the admin dashboard with tabbed navigation for managing members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos, and pause requests.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Provides the admin login flow using Internet Identity with retry, loading, and error handling UI.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty placeholder file for a login page.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Displays login type selection and routes users to admin or member login with transition states.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Implements the member dashboard with tabs for personal dashboard details and the video library.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: Handles member login via membership ID with retries, failure tracking, and backend health checks.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Defines the expected backend version and utilities for comparing and reporting version match status.
Defines the SmokeTestItem interface and a list of admin, member, and health smoke‑test steps, plus a helper to filter tests by category.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: UI overlay for running and tracking smoke tests with progress, categories, and backend health status.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive values from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, animations, container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s state, architecture, known issues, and existing features for the RawFit Gym full‑stack application.
